member.name: M:GTA.ShapeTest.StartTestBoundingBox(GTA.Entity,GTA.IntersectFlags,GTA.ShapeTestOptions)
member.summary:
Start a shape test against the
's bounding box.
member.param: What type of objects the shape test should intersect with.
Specify options for the spape test.
member.value:
The shape test handle. If this method fails to create the shape test request because there are too many ongoing requests,
will return
on the handle struct.
